3306220.name: Frisky Hearts Demo
3306220.description:
Frisky Hearts Demo contains the following features and content:

  • Playable Stage 1: Hallowed Plane.

  • Survive multiple enemy waves to progress.

  • Engage in a dialogue with the enemy boss waifu. Players can flirt and charm her—successful attempts soften her aggression and weaken her attacks, while failed attempts increase her hostility and attack power.

  • Captured enemy waifu (available in the full game) can be summoned in the next stage to provide fire support.

  • Defeat enemies to gain experience, rank up, and upgrade various skills.

  • Choose Vocal Mode to spawn bullets using your voice (mic enabled) or switch to Keypad Mode to relax and recharge your breath for attacks.
3306220.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
